Operation 'customerLoginEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original summary and description are identical and lack clarity about the action being performed. The description doesn't explain what happens (email is sent), what the customer should do with the token, or the authentication flow context. Added details about the passwordless login flow, expected inputs, and side effects (email delivery) for better AI agent understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Send login token to customer email
data.description_suggestion: Sends a login token to the specified customer email address. Accepts a customer email in the request body. The token is delivered via email and can be used with the login token endpoint to authenticate the customer. This initiates a passwordless login flow.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack clarity about the action being performed. The description doesn't explain what happens (email is sent), what the customer should do with the token, or the authentication flow context. Added details about the passwordless login flow, expected inputs, and side effects (email delivery) for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'customerLoginToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing context about token origin, input requirements, and output format. Enhanced description clarifies the token-based authentication flow, links it to the email login operation, and specifies what is returned for successful authentication.

data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a customer using a previously issued login token. Accepts a login token and customer identifier in the request body. Returns authentication credentials or session information upon successful validation. The token must have been previously sent via the email login endpoint.
